metadata.title: onboard-your-ngfws
metadata.description:
Learn how to onboard your firewalls to the centralized management experiences
        available to you: Strata Cloud Manager and Panorama
metadata.keywords: Next-Generation Firewall, Panorama, Getting Started, PANW Yellow Theme, NGFW Getting Started, PAN-OS, Network Security, Strata Cloud Manager

metadata.title: Create a New Support Account
metadata.description:
Learn how to create a new support account so you can register your new
        NGFWs.
metadata.keywords: Next-Generation Firewall, Panorama, Getting Started, PANW Yellow Theme, NGFW Getting Started, PAN-OS, Network Security, Strata Cloud Manager

Learn how to register your Next-Generation Firewalls with Palo Alto
        Networks.

metadata.title: Segment Your Network Using Interfaces and Zones
metadata.description:
Learn to segment the network on your NGFW using interfaces and zones to keep your
        data safe.
metadata.keywords: Next-Generation Firewall, Panorama, Getting Started, PANW Yellow Theme, NGFW Getting Started, PAN-OS, Network Security, Strata Cloud Manager

metadata.title: Enable Free WildFire Forwarding on the NGFW
metadata.description: Learn how to enable free WildFire forwarding on your PAN-OS or Panorama managed NGFWs.
metadata.keywords: Next-Generation Firewall, Panorama, Getting Started, PANW Yellow Theme, NGFW Getting Started, PAN-OS, Network Security, Strata Cloud Manager

metadata.title: Set Up Network Access for External Services
metadata.description:
Learn about how to set up network access to start utilizing remote services like DNS
        servers and license retrieval.
metadata.keywords: 11.1 & Later, Panorama, Getting Started, PANW Yellow Theme, NGFW Getting Started, PAN-OS, Strata Cloud Manager

metadata.title: Configure the Auxiliary Interface Settings
metadata.description:
Configure the connection settings, allowed services, and administrative access
        settings for the auxiliary interfaces.
metadata.keywords: 11.1 & Later, Panorama, Getting Started, PANW Yellow Theme, NGFW Getting Started, PAN-OS, Strata Cloud Manager
